headline: Is Visa (V) Attractively Priced After Recent Global Payments Headlines?
summary: Wondering if Visa at around US$309.94 is a bargain or a trap at current levels? This breakdown aims to help you size up what you are really paying for. Over the past week the stock returned a 0.5% decline, while the 30 day return is 2.8%, set against a year to date return of a 10.5% decline and a 1 year return of a 5.8% decline, with longer term 3 year and 5 year returns of 38.1% and 39.9% respectively. Recent headlines around Visa have focused on its role at the center of global digital...
